\tzpentry{ID5632}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5632 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} j_\ell(k_{\ell n} R) = 0, \label{eq:bessel_boundary} \end{equation}
